headline: Here Are the Stocks Dragging the Dow Lower
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average was underperforming other major indexes midday Thursday, losing around 1.6%, or more than 700 points. The biggest reasons? Falling shares of Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar and Sherwin-Williams.
